name: Initialize
description: Accept-default onboarding for greenfield or brownfield projects; sets up BMAD and td dependency mapping so next-step can run

name: Setup Validation
description: Define project validation methodology and quality gates used by reviews and implementation verification

name: Next Step
description: Analyze td and BMAD workspace state, choose the highest-priority action, and execute it

name: Validate PRD
description: Validate completed delivery against PRD requirements, create td follow-up tasks for gaps, and report residual risk
